playbook.intent: 30-90 min working session → turns vague 'we need this feature' into a ticket with INVEST user story, AC, dependencies, story-points placeholder, compliance/security owner tagged.
playbook.scope: Atomic working session run by the offshore senior with the client PM. Output: a JIRA ticket meeting Definition of Ready — INVEST user story, acceptance criteria, dependencies, story-points placeholder, compliance/security owner tagged if applicable. Live shared-screen drafting, not async ping-pong.

success-criteria.criterion: Ticket meets Definition of Ready before session ends
AC covers happy path + 2 sad paths
Story points placeholder set (real value at poker)

stage.name: Frame
stage.intent: Surface the actual business need behind the feature ask.

tasks.task: Active-listening pass: client PM speaks first, you summarise
Five-whys until the user-story role is real
Pull existing requirements traceability if any

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when user-story passes INVEST self-check.

stage.name: Draft live
stage.intent: Co-edit the ticket on a shared screen; no async back-and-forth.

tasks.task: Use user-story-mapping to place the ticket in context
Document required vs nice-to-have inside the ticket

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when client PM agrees AC live, not after the call.

stage.name: Tag dependencies + DoR
stage.intent: Make the ticket actionable without follow-up.
stage.decision-gate: Done when the ticket survives a 60-second Definition-of-Ready check.

extra.value: [Full requirements elaboration — single ticket, Sprint planning — separate ceremony, Architecture deep dive — surfaced but not designed]
[JIRA project access for both parties, Definition of Ready agreed on the engagement, Compliance regime known (if any)]
[Writing AC after the session — context evaporates inside 30 minutes, Skipping the sad paths — every bug here costs a sprint, Not tagging compliance owner — surprise audit follow-up later]
['Did client PM agree AC live, on shared screen?', 'Could a dev pick this up in a sprint without pinging anyone?', 'Did I tag every regulatory owner the ticket touches?']

{human: faion get-content jira-ticket-scoping-session --format md, agent: faion get-content jira-ticket-scoping-session --format context, json: faion get-content jira-ticket-scoping-session --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P4 outsource-specialist persona, atomic angle'}]
